name: Boiled Beef Pizzaiola
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a shallow baking dish with olive oil.
2. Mix together the tomatoes (including reserved juice), garlic, parsley, oregano, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Line the bottom of the baking dish with half of the tomato mixture.
4. Arrange the sliced boiled beef over the tomato mixture in a single layer.
5. Cover the beef with the remaining tomato mixture.
6. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with reserved juice.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 30 minutes.
